title: Accidental Partners
tmdbOverview: Two women discover they were both scammed by the same man (who also got them pregnant). They form an alliance to take revenge.
synopsis: Accidental Partners is a 2026 comedy and romance film in Spanish. It has a 5.6 rating on IMDb. It's one of the titles we feature across our 2020s and genre rankings. It carries a PG-13 certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
